ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of Solana against USD */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of Solana for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of Solana for the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of Solana for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of Solana for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of Solana for the day */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* User's subscription level (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, decrease) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the alert should be delivered (e.g., email, SMS, app notification) */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., absolute, percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_asset" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency asset in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer accessing the API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key provided to the developer */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the API (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "request_limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the number of requests per day */,
  "api_description" TEXT /* Description of the API access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API access was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API access (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the developer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the developer account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Developer's subscription level (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)
